scripts.build:wasm: cp node_modules/@ladybugdb/wasm-core/index.js lib/index.js && cp node_modules/@ladybugdb/wasm-core/lbug_wasm_worker.js lib/lbug_wasm_worker.js && cp node_modules/@ladybugdb/wasm-core/sync/index.js sync/index.js
scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && vite build && pnpm run copy:lib
